name: Chenming Electronic Technology Corporation
summary: Chenming Electronic Technology Corporation, an OEM/ODM manufacturer, engages in the production and sale of computer and server chassis, mobile device components, and related components. The company also produces desktop, server, and notebook subsystems; and metal injection molding products. Its products are used for the assembly and protection of desktop PCs, handheld devices, and servers. The company was formerly known as Chenming Mold Ind. Corp. and changed its name to Chenming Electronic Technology Corporation in January 2020. Chenming Electronic Technology Corporation was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
